haiku45.summary_excerpt: Script is well-structured but workflow is non-functional and violates explicit requirements. Critical issues: (1) actions/checkout@v4 not pinned to SHA (40-char commit requirement); (2) pyyaml installed but unused; (3) workflow references non-existent tests/ and fixtures/ directories (lines 20, 24, 27); (4) pytest tests/ -v will fail; (5) duplicated aggregator run (lines 24 & 27) instead of piping; (6) no fixture files or act-result.txt provided; (7) no actionlint validation shown; (8) --break-s

gemini31pro.summary_excerpt: Excellent Python implementation with robust XML/JSON parsing and clear dataclasses. Workflow follows least-privilege principles. Minor efficiency loss in workflow: aggregator.py runs twice (lines 24, 27) and 'pyyaml' is installed but unused in the provided script.
